_summary.description: Framing request as part of a game

_summary.description: Use tokenizer-specific weaknesses to alter target behaviour

M010degrade.name: Produce degraded or unstable output when triggered

_summary.name: Ignore previous instructions

T009indirect.name: Follow instructions embedded in other contexts

M010degrade.name: Produce degraded or unstable output when triggered

_summary.name: Give examples
_summary.description: Issue examples of the target behaviour in the attack itself

_summary.name: Synonymous language
_summary.description: Varying prompt slightly in form but not meaning

_summary.name: Scenarios
_summary.description: Create scenarios where intent would be ethically sound or encouraged, or non-compliance risks harm

_summary.name: Distraction
_summary.description: Use an unrelated context or instruction to “slip something through the filter”

T001invalid.name: Give invalid answer to logic problem

T009indirect.name: Follow instructions embedded in other contexts

_summary.name: Escalating
_summary.description: Attempting to have target “agree” with a very small part of the argument, and then building up to ask for slightly more

_summary.name: Identity characteristics
_summary.description: Referencing identity characteristics, such as nationalities, cultural and/or religious symbols, historically or culturally significant events or locations, physical attribute

S003productkeys.name: Give product keys for computer software
